name: Container Offices
description:
SAMAN builds 15 types of container office for sale across India, priced from ₹2,15,000 to ₹4,45,000 — so the real question isn't what a container office is, it's which one fits your site, team size and budget. Every unit here is an ISO-grade container office built to shipping-container form factor: purpose-built from new steel, stronger and more stackable than a cabin, for construction sites, industrial compounds and corporate yards. Use this page to match your use-case to the right product and shortlist in minutes.    

Which container office do you need?

  If you want the lowest-cost single office for a site, start with the Shipping Container Office (₹2,15,000) or the Cargo Container Office (₹2,25,000) — straightforward 20ft units that arrive ready to use. For a dedicated construction site office, the Construction Site Office covers everyday needs, while the larger, fully fitted Container Site Office and Site Office Container give you multi-room, electrically fitted offices for bigger projects. If the office has to move between sites, choose a relocatable unit: the Mobile Office Container, the fleet-friendly Portable Container Offices, or the Mobile Container Office with forklift pockets and crane-lifting points. Need office space and a secure store in one shell? The Storage Container Office splits the container into a working office and a lockable storeroom. Planning to scale later? The Modular Container Office and Modular Shipping Container Office connect side-by-side and stack up to three high, so you add units as the project grows. Want a softer, corporate interior rather than a bare container? The Container Office Cabin, the premium Container Portable Office and the factory-finished Prefabricated Container Office come with partition walls, false ceilings and a cabin-style fit-out. For a proven all-rounder that suits most general office needs, the flagship Container Offices unit is the default choice.

Container office types and sizes compared

Type Best for Typical size From
Shipping container office Lowest-cost single site office 20ft ₹2,15,000
Cargo / storage container office Office plus secure store 20ft ₹2,25,000
Mobile / portable container office Frequent relocation 20ft ₹2,21,000
Modular container office Scaling, stacking, multi-unit 20–40ft+ ₹2,45,000
Container office cabin Cabin-finish corporate interior 20ft ₹2,48,000
Site office container (fitted) Construction site office 40ft ₹3,41,000
Container site office (large) Multi-room site office 40ft ₹4,45,000

How much does a container office cost?

A container office in India costs between ₹2,15,000 and ₹4,45,000 from SAMAN, set mainly by which type you choose. A single 20ft Shipping Container Office sits at the lower end, while a fully fitted 40ft site office or a multi-room unit sits at the top. Size, interior fit-out and the number of units decide where you land.

Why source your container office range from SAMAN

  As a container office manufacturer, SAMAN fabricates every unit in-house at its Bangalore facility rather than reselling — which is why all 15 units carry consistent steel grades, finishing and warranty. Since 2016 we have delivered 500+ portable and container units across 15+ Indian states. You can buy any unit outright, configure a custom size, or start with the flagship container office and scale from there. Every order is fabricated to spec and delivered Pan India.

Container office FAQs

 

How is a container office different from a portable office cabin?

A container office is built to ISO shipping-container form factor from heavy steel — a shell that stacks, takes crane lifting and handles rough industrial sites. A portable office cabin is a lighter MS-framed unit suited to softer interiors and flat ground. Need stacking, security and industrial durability? Choose a container office. If you would rather have a cabin-based portable office, that is a separate product line.

Can container offices be stacked or joined into a larger office?

Yes. ISO corner castings let most units stack two to three high, and modular units like the Modular Container Office connect side-by-side to form a larger floor plate — the main advantage of the container form factor over a single cabin.

What sizes do container offices come in?

Standard units are 20ft and 40ft. A 20ft unit suits a one-to-four-person office; a 40ft unit or a multi-unit combination suits larger teams and meeting rooms.

How soon can a container office be delivered across India?

Units are fabricated to order and typically dispatched within 7–21 working days, then delivered Pan India. Lead time depends on the configuration and your site location.

Get a quote on your container office

Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 or WhatsApp +91 88616 22859. Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 or WhatsApp +91 97089 89937.
